title: Customer Module Deep Optimization (Space & UX)
root_cause: User required extreme UI optimization: minimizing dead space, moving controls to global header, true Excel WYSIWYG export, and editable operational status.
resolution: Compressed KPIs into a single horizontal strip. Portaled Top Control Bar into AppLayout Header. Expanded table max-h. Moved Bank Accounts into dropdown menu. Added shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] to Top Control Bar. Converted CSV export to true XLSX export. Added Trạng thái field to CustomerBasicInfo.tsx.
